case_title: SACK, GREGORY T VS DUCHENE, JOHN P

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO CORRECT OR VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLFT GREGORY SACK GRANTED BY COMM. COURT DATE SET FOR DEC. 22, `1998 AT 0130PM.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY SACK, GREGORY T AS TO DEFENDANT DUCHENE, JOHN P ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-29-1998 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF SACK, GREGORY T HEARING SET FOR DEC-22-1998 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION OF JAN-12-1999, GRANTED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DUCHENE, JOHN P
DEFT'S RESPONSE TO PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST TO CORRECT OR VACATE JUDGMENT FILED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SACK, GREGORY T RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DUCHENE, JOHN P $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,040.00, DAMAGES AWARDED ARE FOR PROPERTY DAMAGES ONLY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PLTF'S REQUEST TO CORRECT OR VACATE JUDGMENT TO BE SUBMITTED TO THE COMMISSIONER AFTER 15 DAY.
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION CONTINUED FROM DEC-22-1998 TO JAN-12-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SACK, GREGORY T RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DUCHENE, JOHN P $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,040.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
I WILL BE ON A PREPAID TRIP AT THAT TIME AND CAN NOT CHANGE THE DATE.
